description.description: Atmospheric prose rendered when the player enters or LOOKs

exits.description: Direction → exit definition. Keys are canonical directions (north, south, east, west, up, down).

requirements.description: Arbitrary flags checked before entry (e.g. requires_item: 'brass_key')

label.description: Button label override for BUTTONS input mode

requirement.description: Item ID that must be in player inventory to traverse this exit

locked_message.description: Message shown when requirement is not met
